audit_items.proof_trace: Exception thrown at line 295 leaves import_stack entry with same memory pointer as resources[idx].contents. Destructor frees resources[i].contents then calls sass_delete_import which unconditionally frees import->source, causing double-free of same allocation.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker provides SASS files with circular @import chains to trigger import loop detection at line 295, causing exception before ownership transfer at lines 303-304.
